title: solena heterophylla subsp. heterophylla
intro: Solena heterophylla subsp. heterophylla, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy or prickly caltrop, is a plant species belonging to the family Capparaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Solena heterophylla subsp. heterophylla include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential uses in treating various health conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Solena heterophylla subsp. heterophylla include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
